title: User administration CRUD
prompt: Create an internal admin application called "User Management". Use dark theme and jwt auth. Add a dashboard page titled "System Overview" with a metric block for total users and a chart block for active sessions. Add navigation entries for the dashboard and the users resource. Define a User model with name, email, role, status, and createdAt. Create a users resource on /api/users with list, edit, and create views. The list view must support filters for email, role, and status; columns for name, email, role, status, and createdAt; create/edit/delete actions; and numbered pagination of 20 rows. The edit view must contain name, email, and role fields, disable email while editing, require hasRole(currentUser, "admin") for enabledIf/allowIf/enforce, and on success refresh users plus toast "User saved successfully". The create view must contain name, email, and role and on success redirect to users.list plus toast "User created".
